blended.narrative: Burke Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,520 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
